name: Fallen Angel: Hell Survival
short_description: Fallen Angel: Hell Survival is a first-person open-world survival craft game set in a brutal, mythic Hell. Scavenge, fight, build, and master devilish magic as Hesicasial — a fallen angel cast into the underworld. Will you conquer Hell, or be consumed by it?
detailed_description:
FROM FALLEN ANGEL TO HELL’S FIERCEST WARRIOR... WILL YOU SURVIVE?





Thrown from the heavens with no memory but your name, Hesicasial awakens in a twisted, burning underworld. Once divine, now something else entirely, she must fight to survive in a land ruled by demons, fire, and devil magick.

Explore a vast and hostile open world, where every demon you slay, every ruin you uncover, and every weapon you forge brings you one step closer to mastering Hell. Hack, slash, shoot fire, cast spells, and build your legacy... or die trying.





Forge powerful gear, tame hellish beasts, and wield forbidden magick. Carve out your own sanctuary amidst the chaos... or storm the fortresses of other devils and crush them beneath your wrath.

But be warned... the night is never your ally in Hell.

KEY FEATURES





Explore a Mythic Hellscape

Traverse a massive, open-world Hell filled with molten lakes, noxious plants, brutal terrain, and demonic threats. Discover hidden ruins and raid devil fortresses for rare loot and ancient secrets.

Mine & Gather

Unearth rare minerals and resources used to forge tools, weapons, armour, and structures. From Stone to the Grim Reaper’s Bones, every material has a purpose.

Craft & Build Freely

Use a voxel-based block system to build anything you can imagine — from survival shelters to towering fortresses. Craft weapons, armour, furniture, storage, and workstations to shape your survival strategy.

Blacksmithing System

Take crafting deeper: sculpt stone moulds, smelt ore, and forge tools and deadly weapons on your anvil. True mastery lies in fire and metals.

Devil Magick & Enchanting

Enhance weapons and gear through ritual enchantment. Sacrifice enemies at sacred pentagrams to imbue your gear with hellish power.

Magic & Combat

Unleash a unique mix of melee combat and spellcasting. Hurl fireballs, drain life from enemies, transform into a shadow and sprint at high speeds, cloak yourself in invisibility, and heal with divine power. Adapt to every encounter.

Survive & Thrive

Manage your hunger, blood, and mana to stay alive. Beware the Tormented Souls — near-unkillable predators that haunt the night.

Tame & Fight Alongside Beasts

Tame creatures like the Hellhound and Succubus with the right offerings and bring them into battle. Use them as loyal companions or defenders of your fortress.


Hunt or Farm to Sustain

Slay demonic creatures for meat and hearts, or grow Plasma Fruit to keep yourself fed and fuelled. How you survive is up to you.

Progression & Achievements

Track your stats, unlock in-game achievements, and evolve from a vulnerable outcast into Hell’s most feared She-Devil.

Recover From Amnesia

Can you find the hidden way to recover the pieces of Hesicasial’s memories that tell the story of why she was sent to hell?
